reviews.comment:
La autopista los perjudicó haciendo que el acceso sea horrible. Aún no actualizaron el shop y tiene menos cosas que otros.
Pero es una excelente opción para parar y sentarte un ratito en su parque.

(Translated by Google)
The highway has made access difficult, which is a real problem. They haven't updated their shop yet, and it has fewer items than other places.

But it's a great option for stopping and sitting for a while in their park.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2cjYtTUhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Deben haber cambiado al cocinero
Volviendo de un viaje ,hoy paramos allí. No es la primera vez que lo hacemos .Pedí tarta de zapallitos ,espantosa !!!!!!!!trozos de zapallitos amargos (probablemente silvestres )hervidos ,envueltos en una masa blanda
Comí unos bocados y de solo recordarlo me provoca nauseas

(Translated by Google)
They must have changed the cook.
Returning from a trip, we stopped there today. It's not our first time. I ordered zucchini tart, horrible! Pieces of bitter (probably wild) zucchini, boiled, wrapped in a soft dough.
I ate a few bites, and just remembering it makes me nauseous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aDVTUjNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El sábado 4 de septiembre se me descompuso el autome auxiliaron llamando a un mecánico muy buena atención estoy muy agradecido a Jony García así se llama el mecánico que mucho amor a lo que hace me arreglo el auto muchas gracias

On Saturday, September 4th, my car broke down. I received assistance by calling a mechanic who provided excellent service. I am very grateful to Jony García, the mechanic, who clearly loves his work and fixed my car. Thank you so much!
